description: 2D grid placement: line-based grid-row placement and row spans via an occupancy grid. Auto items flow around spanned/pinned cells; an explicitly placed cell leaves earlier gaps for later auto items; a row-spanning item taller than its rows grows the last spanned row.
visual_assertions: Sidebar spans both rows in the left column; Rowone and Rowtwo stack in the right column beside it.
Firstcell is top-left and Pincell is pinned to row 2 / column 2; Thirdcell fills the top-right gap Pincell left (so bottom-left stays empty).
The tall two-row span grows its second row so the whole cell fits, pushing the grid (and content after it) down; Rightup and Rightlow stay in the right column.
